zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：[震荡整理，等待突破]
zh.content:
目前以太坊/美元的价格在2134.56附近震荡整理，24小时内变化较小，只有0.10%的涨幅。市场短期走势较为平稳，价格波动在2130.46至2139.44区间内。尽管波动幅度不大，但整体趋势偏向横盘整理，投资者需要关注未来可能的突破。

从技术指标来看，RSI(14)暂时缺失，MACD的值为19.021677，表明市场存在一定的买盘力量，然而由于Signal未提供数据，无法进一步确认是否存在强烈的买入信号。SMA(20)为2112.25，当前价格高于该水平，显示出一定的上行趋势支撑。

在支撑位方面，2130.46一带为短期支撑，若价格跌破此位，可能会向2100附近回落。阻力位则位于2139.44，突破此位有望引发进一步的上涨。若市场突破2140上方，可能迎来更强的买盘动能。

综合来看，当前的市场呈现出震荡整理的格局，建议投资者短期内保持观望，等待突破确认。在突破2139.44或跌破2130.46时，可以适时采取相应的交易策略。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently trading just above its short-term average, with price hovering at 2134.56 while the 20-period SMA sits near 2112.25. This positioning suggests a mild bullish bias in the near term, although momentum appears limited given the very narrow daily range. The marginal 0.10% gain reflects a market lacking conviction, often characteristic of consolidation before a directional move.

Momentum indicators provide a mixed but slightly constructive picture. The MACD value remains positive at 19.02, indicating underlying bullish momentum, though the absence of a signal line limits confirmation of trend strength. RSI data is unavailable, but the tight price action implies neither overbought nor oversold conditions. Overall, momentum favors buyers, but without strong acceleration or breakout signals.

Key support is forming around the 2130 zone, closely aligned with the recent daily low at 2130.46. A break below this level could expose the 2110–2115 region, where the SMA(20) may act as dynamic support. On the upside, resistance is clearly defined near 2140, corresponding to the recent high at 2139.44. A sustained move above this level could open the path toward the 2160–2180 range.

From a trading perspective, range-bound strategies appear most appropriate in the short term. Buying near support and selling near resistance may offer favorable risk-reward until a breakout occurs. More aggressive traders could watch for a confirmed move above 2140 to enter momentum-driven longs, while a breakdown below 2130 may justify short exposure. Patience is warranted until volatility expands and directional clarity improves.
